description.zh-Hans: 调整颜色属性：亮度、对比度、饱和度、色相偏移。支持调色板限制（索引颜色模式），实现像素艺术风格。
description.en: Adjusts color properties: brightness, contrast, saturation, hue shift. Also supports palette limiting (indexed color mode) for pixel art style.

triggers.zh-Hans: 颜色调整, 亮度, 对比度, 饱和度, 色相, 伽马, 色温, 反相
triggers.en: color adjust, brightness, contrast, saturation, hue, gamma, color temp, invert

exampleUsage.zh-Hans: 调整精灵的亮度和对比度以匹配场景光照。
exampleUsage.en: Adjust brightness and contrast of a sprite to match scene lighting.
